mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT n.id AS sourceDocId, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.MesBizTypeConstants@WM_ARRIVAL_NOTICE} AS sourceDocType, n.code AS sourceDocCode, l.id AS sourceLineId, n.arrival_date AS recordTime, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.qc.MesQcTypeEnum@IQC.type} AS qcType, l.item_id AS itemId, l.arrival_quantity AS quantity, n.vendor_id AS vendorId, NULL AS workOrderId, NULL AS workstationId, NULL AS taskId, NULL AS clientId FROM mes_wm_arrival_notice n JOIN mes_wm_arrival_notice_line l ON n.id = l.notice_id WHERE n.status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.wm.MesWmArrivalNoticeStatusEnum@PENDING_QC.status} AND l.iqc_check_flag = 1 AND l.iqc_id IS NULL AND n.deleted = 0 AND l.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT r.id AS sourceDocId, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.MesBizTypeConstants@WM_OUTSOURCE_RECPT} AS sourceDocType, r.code AS sourceDocCode, rl.id AS sourceLineId, r.receipt_date AS recordTime, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.qc.MesQcTypeEnum@IQC.type} AS qcType, rl.item_id AS itemId, rl.quantity AS quantity, r.vendor_id AS vendorId, NULL AS workOrderId, NULL AS workstationId, NULL AS taskId, NULL AS clientId FROM mes_wm_outsource_receipt r JOIN mes_wm_outsource_receipt_line rl ON r.id = rl.receipt_id WHERE r.status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.wm.MesWmOutsourceReceiptStatusEnum@CONFIRMED.status} AND rl.iqc_check_flag = 1 AND rl.iqc_id IS NULL AND r.deleted = 0 AND rl.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT pf.id AS sourceDocId, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.MesBizTypeConstants@PRO_FEEDBACK} AS sourceDocType, pf.code AS sourceDocCode, ppl.id AS sourceLineId, pf.feedback_time AS recordTime, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.qc.MesQcTypeEnum@IPQC.type} AS qcType, ppl.item_id AS itemId, ppl.quantity AS quantity, NULL AS vendorId, pp.work_order_id AS workOrderId, pp.workstation_id AS workstationId, pp.task_id AS taskId, NULL AS clientId FROM mes_wm_product_produce_line ppl JOIN mes_wm_product_produce pp ON ppl.produce_id = pp.id JOIN mes_pro_feedback pf ON pp.feedback_id = pf.id WHERE ppl.quality_status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.wm.MesWmQualityStatusEnum@PENDING.status} AND ppl.deleted = 0 AND pp.deleted = 0 AND pf.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT s.id AS sourceDocId, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.MesBizTypeConstants@WM_PRODUCT_SALES} AS sourceDocType, s.code AS sourceDocCode, sl.id AS sourceLineId, s.sales_date AS recordTime, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.qc.MesQcTypeEnum@OQC.type} AS qcType, sl.item_id AS itemId, sl.quantity AS quantity, NULL AS vendorId, NULL AS workOrderId, NULL AS workstationId, NULL AS taskId, s.client_id AS clientId FROM mes_wm_product_sales s JOIN mes_wm_product_sales_line sl ON s.id = sl.sales_id WHERE sl.oqc_check_flag = 1 AND sl.oqc_id IS NULL AND s.status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.wm.MesWmProductSalesStatusEnum@CONFIRMED.status} AND s.deleted = 0 AND sl.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT ri.id AS sourceDocId, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.MesBizTypeConstants@WM_RETURN_ISSUE} AS sourceDocType, ri.code AS sourceDocCode, ril.id AS sourceLineId, ri.return_date AS recordTime, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.qc.MesQcTypeEnum@RQC.type} AS qcType, ril.item_id AS itemId, ril.quantity AS quantity, NULL AS vendorId, ri.work_order_id AS workOrderId, ri.workstation_id AS workstationId, NULL AS taskId, NULL AS clientId FROM mes_wm_return_issue ri JOIN mes_wm_return_issue_line ril ON ri.id = ril.issue_id WHERE ri.status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.wm.MesWmReturnIssueStatusEnum@CONFIRMED.status} AND ril.rqc_check_flag = 1 AND ril.rqc_id IS NULL AND ril.quality_status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.wm.MesWmQualityStatusEnum@PENDING.status} AND ri.deleted = 0 AND ril.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT r.id AS sourceDocId, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.MesBizTypeConstants@WM_RETURN_SALES} AS sourceDocType, r.code AS sourceDocCode, rl.id AS sourceLineId, r.return_date AS recordTime, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.qc.MesQcTypeEnum@RQC.type} AS qcType, rl.item_id AS itemId, rl.quantity AS quantity, NULL AS vendorId, NULL AS workOrderId, NULL AS workstationId, NULL AS taskId, r.client_id AS clientId FROM mes_wm_return_sales r JOIN mes_wm_return_sales_line rl ON r.id = rl.return_id WHERE r.status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.wm.MesWmReturnSalesStatusEnum@CONFIRMED.status} AND rl.rqc_check_flag = 1 AND rl.rqc_id IS NULL AND rl.quality_status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.wm.MesWmQualityStatusEnum@PENDING.status} AND r.deleted = 0 AND rl.deleted = 0 ) t
AND t.sourceDocCode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sourceDocCode}, '%')
AND t.qcType = #{qcType}
AND t.itemId = #{itemId}
ORDER BY t.recordTime DESC
